strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production roles — well exceeds the 6-year threshold
Active AI agent development at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — direct match to the AI agent requirement
Deep, demonstrated TDD culture: created the Fluent-Asserts testing library, organized Code Kata sessions, taught TDD in Selenium courses — strong signal for testing framework proficiency
concerns: No Nest.js mentioned anywhere in the resume — the primary backend framework for this role is entirely absent
Kotlin is not listed in skills or employment history; Java appears in older embedded/robotics work but not in web backend contexts
PostgreSQL is not explicitly referenced; database experience is MongoDB and MySQL-weighted, leaving a gap in the relational database requirement
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match on the most differentiating requirements: current hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq directly satisfies the AI agent development criterion, and his TypeScript/Node.js/React record across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq gives high confidence in the primary stack. His testing culture runs unusually deep — he built a TDD library, ran dojos, and taught it formally — which aligns well with a Vitest-heavy shop. The main gap is Nest.js, which is the specified backend framework and absent from his history; this is mitigable through ramp-up but is a real onboarding cost. Missing Kotlin and explicit PostgreSQL experience are secondary concerns given Java appears in his background and SQL literacy is evident.
